summary: Adds missing ContainerPort.Protocol defaulting to TCP in ContainerDefaults, fixing the spurious update loop identified by greptile-apps[bot]. The docstring is updated and test coverage exercises both the empty-protocol default and explicit-protocol preservation. The fix mirrors the existing ServiceSpecDefaults pattern for port protocol defaulting.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (13/13 in normalize package)
Edge cases covered: empty protocol defaults to TCP
Edge cases covered: explicit UDP protocol preserved
Edge cases covered: container with no ports (implicitly covered by TestPodSpecDefaults)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing normalization pattern (if field == zero { field = default })
Consistent with ServiceSpecDefaults port protocol defaulting (service.go:29-33)
Docstring updated to reflect new behavior
Minimal change — 5 lines of logic + docstring

security_checklist.item: No external input — pure defaulting function

architecture_checklist.item: No scope creep beyond external reviewer feedback

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No duplicated code — same pattern as ServiceSpecDefaults

fail_fast_checklist.item: Defaults set early before comparison — prevents false diffs

defensive_checklist.item: Guards against empty Protocol field correctly

title: B002: Implement Kubernetes-interacting packages
